title: Portable Villager
description: Allows you to pick up villagers.
body:
This mod allows you to pick up villagers by right-clicking one while pressing shift key (sneaking) with an empty hand.

It is not recommended to store too many villager items in containers within a chunk, to avoid excessively large NBT.

![A demonstration of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbb61e6a431e01644e57b522b22911b66357f06a.gif)
